judgments.conclusion: Non-violation de l'article 8 - Droit au respect de la vie privée et familiale (Article 8-1 - Respect de la vie privée)

judgments.docname: CASE OF TALESKI AND OTHERS v. NORTH MACEDONIA
judgments.conclusion: Remainder inadmissible (Art. 35) Admissibility criteria;(Art. 35-1) Exhaustion of domestic remedies;No violation of Article 6 - Right to a fair trial (Article 6 - Criminal proceedings;Article 6-1 - Fair hearing);Violation of Article 6 - Right to a fair trial (Article 6 - Criminal proceedings;Article 6-1 - Fair hearing;Adversarial trial);Non-pecuniary damage - award (Article 41 - Non-pecuniary damage;Just satisfaction)
